raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apsēnitahs ta KUN-
GA Bahrsiba prett Israëlu/ un
wiꞥſch pahrdevve tohs Kusan Ri-
satāima ta Mesopotamijas Keh-
nixa Rohkâ/ un Israëta Behr-
ni kalpoja Kusan Risatatmam
aston Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad brehze Israëta Behr-
ni us to KUNGII/ un tas klings
eezeble Israëta Behrneem weenu
Pestitaju/ kas tohs tspestija/Ot-
nêlu / Kenafa Kahleba jaunaka
Brahta Dehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Garś bija
us winnu/un wiꞥſch atreebe Isra-
ëlu / un tsgahje Karrâ/ un tas
KUNGS dewe Kusan Risatai-
mu to Mesopotamijas Kehnizu
winna Rohkâ/ ka winna Rohka
stipra bija prett KusanRisataimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad duſſeja ta Semine
tschetrdesmits Gaddus / un Ot-
nêls Kenafa Dehls nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Israëta Behrni dar-
rija atkat/ kas tam KUNGAM
ne patikke / tad stiprinaja tas
KUNGS Eglonu to Moabiteru
Kehnianu prett Israëlu / tapehz/
ka tee darrija / kas tain KUN-
GAM ne patikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fapnilzeja pee
fewim tohs Ammona Behrnis/
un Amaleku/un zehlahs/un kawe
Israëlu/ un tee usnehme to Pal-
mo-Pilskahtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Israëta Behrni kalpo-
ja Eglonam tam Moaba Kehnt-
nin astonpadeſmits Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad brehze Israëta Behr-
ni us to KUNGU/un tas KUNgs
eezeble teem weenu Pestitaju/
Eüdu to Dehlu Gerus / Jennui
Dehla/ kas Kreillis bija/un Israë-
ta Behrni fuhttja Eglonam tam
Moaba Kehnizam tahdu Dah-
wann zaar winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Eüds darrija preekſch
fewim weenu Sohbinu ar diwi
Asninaem / Ohlekts Garzuma/
un apjohse to appakſch fatwahin
Drehbehm pee farwas lubbas
Ziskas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch noneffe Eglo-
nam tam Moaba Kehninam
Dahwanas / un Eglons bija
weens tohti refns Mihrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch beidſis bij
to Dahwanu nodoht / tad atlats-
de wiꞥſch tohs Landis/ kas to
Dahwanu bij neﬀſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet wiꞥſch atgreesaſe no
tahn isgreestahm Bildehm/ kas
Gilgala bija/ un fazzia: Man
irr weena fleppena Lecta tew / ak
Kehniasch! jafakka/ un tas faz-
zija : Zeet kluffu/ tad tsgahje wiſ-
fi alra/ kas ap winau stahweja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Eüds nahze pee win-
na/ bet wiꞥſch fehdeja tahdā dse-
ſtrā Kambari/ ko wiꞥſch preekſch
few ween turreja / tad fazzia E-
uds: man irr Deewa Wahrdsus
zew / tad zehlahs wiꞥſch no ta
Krehſla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad issteepc Eüds fawu
krejsu Rohku/un nehine to Soh-
binu no farwas lubbas Zistas/ un
ceduhre to winnam Wehdera.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
